name: saw
effect: Use to split 1 die.

name: hammer
effect: Use to split 1 die into die(1)s.

name: tower
effect: Use to reroll 1 die.

name: chisel
effect: Use to reduce die roll by 1.

name: glue
effect: Use to merge 2 dice.

name: calculator
effect: Use to multiply roll value of a die by 2.

name: ball
effect: Use to get 1 die. This looses 1 *use* when item is moved to void.

name: printer
effect: Use to select two dice| second becomes a copy of first.

name: bucket
effect: When this moves| get a die(2).

name: piggy
effect: When this moves to bag| get 1 die.

name: delay
effect: Tool *uses* are made equal to their cost at the start of the turn.

name: jar
effect: When an item moves to void| gain die(1).

name: limit
effect: Get 3 item at the start of the turn.

name: sale
effect: At the start of the turn Item costs are reduced by 1.

name: binder
effect: When relic moves to bag| get 1 die.

name: zombie
effect: When you get a die(2)| 2 items move from pile to table.

name: rope
effect: When you get a die(6)| 1 tool moves from table to void.

name: cat
effect: When relic moves to table| it moves to void.

name: tax
effect: Whenever you get a die its value is reduced by 1.

name: frog
effect: Whenever you get a die its value is increased by 1.

name: stone
effect: Use to swap item cost with a die.

name: catapult
effect: Use to move 1 item on table to pile.

name: acid
effect: Use to move 1 item on table to void| then gain 1 die.

name: bingo
effect: 3 items with the same cost move to bag at the end of the turn.

name: crown
effect: When this moves to void| 1 random item on table moves to bag.

name: idol
effect: Use to swap this with an item in bag.

name: slots
effect: Use to reroll costs of items on the table.

name: counterspell
effect: Use to move this to void| then all items on table move to pile.

name: mirror
effect: Use to become a copy of an item.

name: necronomicon
effect: Use to move 1 relic from void to table.
